    Then status 200 # the status code response should be 200
    PassTo get all the data from application in XML format using path variable
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:21:28.376 Running in env: stage
    And path '/normal/webapi/all'
    And header Accept = 'application/xml'
    When method get # Send the get request
    [print] 22:21:28.379 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9897/normal/webapi/all 1 > Accept: application/xml 1 > Host: localhost:9897 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:21:28.398 response time in milliseconds: 17 1 < 200 1 < X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff 1 < X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block 1 < Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate 1 < Pragma: no-cache 1 < Expires: 0 1 < X-Frame-Options: DENY 1 < Content-Type: application/xml 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked 1 < Date: Mon, 20 Apr 2026 16:51:28 GMT 1 < Keep-Alive: timeout=60 1 < Connection: keep-alive 9980Software Engg -     Then status 200
    * def entry = karate.filter(response, function(x){ return x.jobId == 1 && x.jobTitle == 'Software Engg' })[0]
    And match entry.jobId == 1
    And match entry.experience[1] == 'Apple'
    And match entry.project[0].projectName == 'Movie App'
    And match entry.project[0].technology[2] == 'Gradle'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3]'
    And match entry.project[0].technology == '#[3]'
    And match entry.experience[*] == ['Google','Apple','Mobile Iron']
    And match entry.project[0].technology[*] == ['Kotlin','SQL Lite','Gradle']
    And match entry.experience[*] contains ['Mobile Iron','Apple']
    And match entry.project[0].technology[*] contains ['SQL Lite']
    And match response.[*].jobId contains 1
    PassTo get the data in JSON format and validate using fuzzy matcher
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:21:28.493 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}

    Then status 200
    * def entry = karate.filter(response, function(x){ return x.jobId == 1 && x.jobTitle == 'Software Engg' })[0]
    And match entry.jobId == '#present'
    And match entry.experience[1] == '#notnull'
    And match entry.project[0].projectName == '#ignore'
    And match entry.project[0].technology == '#array'
    And match entry.jobTitle == '#string'
    And match entry.jobId == '#number'
    And match entry.jobId == '#? _ >= 1'
    And match entry.jobTitle == '#string? _.length == 13'
    And match entry.experience == '#[]'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3]'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3] #string'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3] #string? _.length >= 2'
    FailTo get the data in XML format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:21:28.524 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}
    And headers {Accept : 'application/json', Content-Type: 'application/json'}
    When method post
    [print] 22:21:28.528 request: 1 > POST http://localhost:9897/normal/webapi/add 1 > Accept: application/json 1 > Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 1 > Content-Length: 218 1 > Host: localhost:9897 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate {"jobId":1,"jobTitle":"Software Engg","jobDescription":"To develop andriod application","experience":["Google","Apple","Mobile Iron"],"project":[{"projectName":"Movie App","technology":["Kotlin","SQL Lite","Gradle"]}]} 22:21:28.530 response time in milliseconds: 2 1 < 201 1 < X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff 1 < X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block 1 < Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate 1 < Pragma: no-cache 1 < Expires: 0 1 < X-Frame-Options: DENY 1 < Content-Type: application/json 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked 1 < Date: Mon, 20 Apr 2026 16:51:28 GMT 1 < Keep-Alive: timeout=60 1 < Connection: keep-alive {"jobId":1,"jobTitle":"Software Engg","jobDescription":"To develop andriod application","experience":["Google","Apple","Mobile Iron"],"project":[{"projectName":"Movie App","technology":["Kotlin","SQL Lite","Gradle"]}]}

    * def actualResponse = read('classpath:datafiles/JsonResponse.json')
    And print "File ==> ", actualResponse
    [print] 22:21:28.624 [print] File ==> [ { "jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "project": [ { "technology": [ "Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle" ], "projectName": "Movie App" } ], "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": [ "Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron" ] } ]

    And match filteredResponse[0] == actualResponse[0]
    PassTo get the data in xml format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:21:28.630 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}

  • Variables Creation in Karate Framework

    10:21:30 pm / 00:00:00:000 Pass

    Variables Creation in Karate Framework
    04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 00:00:00:000 · #test-id=741
    PassTo create a Variable
    * def app_name = "Google"
    [print] 22:21:28.641 Running in env: stage
    * def page_lode_timeout = 20
    Given def var_int = 10
    And def var_string = "Karate"
    Then print "Int Variable ==> ", var_int
    [print] 22:21:28.645 [print] Int Variable ==> 10
    And print "String Variable ==> ", var_string
    [print] 22:21:28.646 [print] String Variable ==> Karate
    * def var_int_2 = var_int + 10
    And print "New Variable ==> ", var_int_2
    [print] 22:21:28.648 [print] New Variable ==> 20
    And print "BackGroud Section Variabel ==> ", app_name , page_lode_timeout
    [print] 22:21:28.649 [print] BackGroud Section Variabel ==> Google 20
    PassAcces the Variable
    * def app_name = "Google"
    [print] 22:21:28.653 Running in env: stage
    * def page_lode_timeout = 20
    * def var_int = 1
    * def var_string = "New"
    * def var_int_2 = var_int + 90
    Given print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_int
    [print] 22:21:28.657 [print] Previous Scenario ==> 1
    And print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_string
    [print] 22:21:28.658 [print] Previous Scenario ==> New
    And print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_int_2
    [print] 22:21:28.664 [print] Previous Scenario ==> 91
    And print "BackGroud Section Variabel ==> ", app_name , page_lode_timeout
    [print] 22:21:28.665 [print] BackGroud Section Variabel ==> Google 20

  • To test the mock API created using WireMock standalone server

    10:21:30 pm / 00:00:00:002 Pass

    To test the mock API created using WireMock standalone server
    04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 00:00:00:002 · #test-id=762
    PassValidate SUCCESS response
    * def baseUrl = wiremockurl
    [print] 22:21:28.667 Running in env: stage
    Given url baseUrl + '/payment/status'
    When method GET
    [print] 22:21:28.671 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9898/payment/status 1 > Host: localhost:9898 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:21:28.679 response time in milliseconds: 7 1 < 200 1 < Matched-Stub-Id: 63643c95-629c-4f9b-b954-f5c76cdb63c0 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked
    Then status 200
    And match response.status == 'SUCCESS'
    And match response.message == 'Payment processed'
    PassValidate FAILURE response
    * def baseUrl = wiremockurl
    [print] 22:21:28.684 Running in env: stage
    Given url baseUrl + '/payment/status?type=fail'
    When method GET
    [print] 22:21:28.687 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9898/payment/status?type=fail 1 > Host: localhost:9898 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:21:28.696 response time in milliseconds: 9 1 < 500 1 < Matched-Stub-Id: 6d92bfbb-0b81-4916-90f2-2a297f6e07dc 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked
    Then status 500
    And match response.status == 'FAILED'
    And match response.message == 'Payment declined'

  • To create the Job entry in the application

    10:21:30 pm / 00:00:00:002 Pass

    To create the Job entry in the application
    04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 04.20.2026 10:21:30 pm 00:00:00:002 · #test-id=777
    Use POST /normal/webapi/add to create job entry in the application
    PassTo create the Job Entry in JSON format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:21:28.701 Running in env: stage
